business_problem: PrestoMall (formerly 11street Malaysia), the largest homegrown online marketplace in Malaysia, saw 250%+ user growth between 2015 and 2018 fiscal years and faced increasing competition, but its previous on-premises IT infrastructure carried high licensing fees and could not provide the elasticity, scalability, or cost-efficiency needed for continued growth.
solution_summary: PrestoMall, Malaysia's largest homegrown e-commerce marketplace, migrated from legacy on-premises database infrastructure to cloud-native PolarDB to support 250% user growth and elastic scalability demands. The solution ingests order transactions, product catalog data, and inventory updates at scale through Database Transmission Service ensuring zero-downtime synchronization. PolarDB's MySQL-compatible architecture handles millions of queries per second while supporting 100+ terabytes of merchant and transaction data with 40% reduction in IT operational spending. The cloud-native approach eliminates licensing costs and provides high availability enabling PrestoMall to scale confidently while maintaining competitive pricing.
business_outcome: PrestoMall migrated successfully within a very short period, gained higher security, reliability, and availability, and achieved over a 40% decrease in IT spending. Its systems can now process millions of queries per second and support up to 100 TB of data.
metrics: 250%+ registered user growth between FY2015 and FY2018
40%+ decrease in IT spending after migration
Millions of queries per second supported
Up to 100 TB of data supported
architecture_clues: PolarDB is a cloud-native relational database compatible with MySQL, PostgreSQL, and Oracle
DTS used for data migration and synchronization between data engines
evidence_quotes: The more efficient systems of Alibaba Cloud have also helped PrestoMall achieved over a 40% decrease in IT spending.
PrestoMall's systems are capable of processing millions of queries per second, supporting up to 100 terabytes of data, while still maintaining a high level of security and system reliability.
Erwin Foo, Group Chief Technology Officer of PrestoMall: 'We were very happy to work with Alibaba Cloud Intelligence for the migration of our database to PolarDB.'

solution_components.name: ApsaraDB for PolarDB
solution_components.role: Cloud-native relational database handling millions of queries per second for e-commerce transactions

solution_components.name: Data Transmission Service
solution_components.role: Zero-downtime data synchronization and migration from legacy database systems to PolarDB

solution_components.name: Alibaba Cloud Migration Services
solution_components.role: Managed infrastructure migration services supporting rapid deployment within short timelines

data_flow: Legacy on-premises databases → DTS synchronization layer → PolarDB cloud database → e-commerce applications
